display.brightness.set.title: Set display brightness
display.brightness.set.description: Set the local display brightness from a canonical percentage payload.
search_terms: screen display brightness dimmer illumination percent

display.power.off.title: Turn display off
display.power.off.description: Request local display power-off through the desktop display-power integration.
search_terms: screen display monitor power off sleep

display.power.on.title: Turn display on
display.power.on.description: Request local display power-on through the desktop display-power integration.
search_terms: screen display monitor power on wake

display.power.wake.title: Wake display and session
display.power.wake.description: Wake the local display and optionally switch to a configured desktop user session.
search_terms: screen display wake login session vehicle present

media.mute.toggle.title: Toggle audio mute
media.mute.toggle.description: Toggle mute for the local default audio sink.
search_terms: audio sound volume mute unmute toggle

media.playback.next.title: Next media item
media.playback.next.description: Advance the active playback context to its next playable item.
search_terms: media music next track song skip forward

media.playback.previous.title: Previous media item
media.playback.previous.description: Move the active playback context to its previous playable item.
search_terms: media music previous track song skip back

media.playback.toggle.title: Toggle play or pause
media.playback.toggle.description: Toggle the active playback context between playing and paused states.
search_terms: media music play pause resume toggle

media.volume.decrease.title: Decrease audio volume
media.volume.decrease.description: Decrease the local default audio-sink volume by an optional configured percentage step.
search_terms: audio sound volume down lower decrease quieter

media.volume.increase.title: Increase audio volume
media.volume.increase.description: Increase the local default audio-sink volume by an optional configured percentage step.
search_terms: audio sound volume up raise increase louder

navigation.focus.left.title: Move focus left
navigation.focus.left.description: Move the currently focused local interface one logical step to the left.
search_terms: navigation focus cursor arrow left interface

navigation.focus.right.title: Move focus right
navigation.focus.right.description: Move the currently focused local interface one logical step to the right.
search_terms: navigation focus cursor arrow right interface
